title: v1.0.63 Update
description: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.63! This update focuses on critical stability, smarter data caching, and rich improvements to our clientside PDF report generation tools.
features:
💪 Workout Mode Refinements
Intelligent Field Constraints: The source bank filter now automatically disables unsupported external options for the CSEB course tracking view, preventing configuration errors.

Smoother Dropdowns: Enhanced the database routing hooks to ensure a cleaner, more responsive subtopic list population when picking subjects.

🔍 Integrated Report Analyzer Fixes
Strict PDF Parsing: Upgraded the embedded Report Analyzer within the Analytics hub to prevent processing crashes caused by missing colon formatting identifiers in incoming text streams.

📄 Massively Enhanced PDF Reports
Richer Metrics Array: Lifetime Study Reports have been completely overhauled to bundle contextual summary counts, exact historical streaks, mock exam accuracies, and card workout metrics safely into a single document layout.

Weekly Subject Progress Correction: The progression percentage tracking within the Study PDF export has been corrected to compute strictly against your active weekly hour allocations rather than duplicating lifetime totals.

Granular Monthly & Attendance Reports: Monthly report prints now append discrete per-subject hours alongside raw calendar markings, while Attendance exports incorporate a dedicated weekly progress matrix.

⚡ Performance & Logic Tuning
Aggressive Memory Caching: Implemented an internal aggregate memory cache wrapper to completely bypass expensive loops. The app now blocks redundant matrix paint routines unless true mutations occur in your local data tables.

Flawless Timezone Grouping: Reconfigured the calendar baseline calculations to enforce strict local timezone tracking, aligning weekly metrics and charts to correctly group days from Sunday through Saturday without boundary bleeding.
